title: NoCapsLock
description: client-side mod that disables effect of Caps Lock when typing in chat
body:
Tired of accidental shouting in chat? NoCapsLock automatically disables the Caps Lock key while typing in Minecraft’s chat 🧵, keeping your messages clean and calm. `Shift` + `letter` still works for proper capitalization.

### Why? 🤔
`A` key sits way too close to `Caps Lock` - one wrong press and you're SCREAMING. This mod saves your fingers.
